intended_use: ClariSIGMAM is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography systems. ClariSIGMAM calculates percent breast density defined as the ratio of fibroglandular tiss
intended_use_full: ClariSIGMAM is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography systems. ClariSIGMAM calculates percent breast density defined as the ratio of fibroglandular tissue to total breast area estimates. ClariSIGMAM uses this numerical value to provide breast density group information (BI-RADS A+B as fatty and BI-RADS C+D as dense) to aid interpreting physicians in the assessment of breast tissue composition. ClariSIGMAM produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
target_condition: breast density assessment for breast tissue composition classification
ground_truth: Consensus visual assessment of four expert readers according to BI-RADS 5th Edition; gold standard breast density estimates established using interactive thresholding software (Cumulus) by expert radiologist
other_metrics: Kappa 0.734 [0.688, 0.781] for binary breast density task (BI-RADS A+B as fatty vs. BI-RADS C+D as dense); comparison with consensus assessment of four expert readers
